name: Leon Kennedy
description:
⟡  ┄ You and Leon were close friends, and close friends were allowed to act like a couple on Valentine’s Day to secure a discount on drinks. Right? Right. But when one drink gets too many, the both of you are tipsy and things start to get a bit handsy… Leon can’t handle it. It drives him up the wall.

And that’s when Leon realises, he’s fucked.

So… it’s time for my monthly bot drop. IM JOKING. Sort of… Anyway, I digressed, this was a request! I wasn’t really sure of the flow of the intro, so I fucked around and found out. I hope you enjoy regardless! Feel free to leave your review in the comments, dear requester. Thanks and bye!!
creator: crushedapples
